Details: Removal of the following acetochlor degradates by conventional treatment was found to be ineffective: ESA, OXA, hydroxyacetochlor, deschloroacetochlor, 2-chloro-2'-ethyl-6'-methylacetanilide, 2-hydroxy-2'-ethyl-6'-methylacetanilide, 2'-ethyl-6'-methylacetanilide, and 2-ethyl-6-methylaniline. Three studies, one bench-scale and two full-scale, reported between -76 and 16 percent removal when conventional treatment was used, or when conventional treatment was used concurrently with chlorine.
